name: CIMG Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview CIMG is a company incorporated in Nevada and has been listed on Nasdaq since June 2020. We were formerly known as Nuzee, Inc. with a previous ticker symbol NUZE, and we changed our corporate name and ticker symbol to CIMG Inc. and IMG in October 2024. We previously focused on specialty coffee and related technologies, but we are now expanding our sales and distribution channels in Asia to provide a wider variety of healthy foods to Asian customers.
